properties.name: Feature: 2E ADV/DIS - Advantage & Disadvantage
properties.author: Kerry Harrison (sirkerry)
properties.description: Adds Advantage/Disadvantage roll mechanics (roll 2d20, keep the favorable one) to all four 2E d20 roll types - attacks, saves, ability checks, and skill checks - via two new modifier stack buttons. Correctly inverts which die counts as favorable for 2E's roll-under ability/skill checks. No changes to any stock ruleset file.

announcement.text: 2E ADV/DIS - Advantage & Disadvantage - Version 1.0 by sirkerry
